caption: A man with a dark beard, wearing a black baseball cap and a red hoodie, speaks directly into the camera while standing outdoors in a parking lot. In the background, a gray vehicle is parked to his side, and a white building with a blue roof is visible across a road. Trees and utility poles line the area under a clear blue sky. As the scene progresses, the man continues to talk, his facial expressions shifting as he speaks, and his head tilting slightly. The camera remains in a close-up shot of the man, capturing his movements and the surrounding environment. There is no on-screen text or visible logos in the frames. The lighting is bright and natural, and the overall scene remains consistent, with only the man's mouth and head movements changing as he addresses the camera.
